description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/role_unit/role_unit_containers:build with a docker:dind service, sets the DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive and DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 variables, and installs py-dnspython and ipvsadm via apk in a before_script. Define six jobs—cluster_debian8, cluster_debian9, single_debian8, single_debian9, syntax_debian8, and syntax_debian9—all running in the default test stage. Each job executes the exact script: `RU_ENV_IMAGE=${CI_JOB_NAME/*_/} tests/bash_unit tests/tests_keepalived_${CI_JOB_NAME/_*/}`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, and the pipeline does not deploy anywhere.
